name: Horror Starter
tagline: First-person horror kit — flashlight, interaction, jump scare
description: A ready-to-play first-person horror foundation: Quake-feel FP controller with pause overlay, battery-drained flashlight that casts real shadows, [E] interaction with a sliding door, material-driven footsteps, and a scripted jump scare (trigger volume + spawned stalker + post-FX panic ramp). Fog, vignette and film grain are authored per scene in the Environment panel — everything gameplay lives in plain project scripts you can read and change.
